creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Yes, this is true.
lang/gnat-aux is based on gcc-4.6
If possible, you should use lang/gcc-aux, which is based on gcc-4.7

This problem was recognized and "fixed" in lang/gcc-aux.  The base
location is /usr/local/gcc-aux/ rather than /usr/local/ and thus has
no file conflicts.

I don't lang/gnat-aux conflict is easily fixable based on its install
prefix.  I would recommend users use lang/gcc-aux over lang/gnat-aux
and not do anything to lang/gnat-aux in response to this PR.
